description: All Rel-L2 results from GNN-PINN vs MLP-PINN comparison
paper: When Does Graph Structure Help in Physics-Informed Neural Networks?
note: All experiments use equal training budgets for fair comparison

1d_uniform_rod.description: 1D wave eq, c=1.0 everywhere, exact solution sin(pi*x)cos(pi*t)

1d_bimetallic_rod.description: 1D wave eq, c1=1.0 / c2=1.5, smooth sigmoid interface at x=0.5

2d_membrane.description: 2D wave eq on irregular Delaunay mesh (~180 nodes), c=1.0

aggregation_comparison_2d.description: GNN aggregation strategies on 2D membrane (2000 epochs each)
